name: Curry Marinade
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all the ingredients in a container.
2. Stir well to ensure everything is mixed evenly.
3. Use this marinade to marinate cubed tempeh for at least one hour.
4. Brush over grilling eggplant, onions, or potatoes.
5. For best results when grilling potatoes, consider parboiling them first.
